name: APDS9960 Sensor
description: The `apds9960` sensor platform allows you to use your APDS9960 RGB and gesture sensors ([datasheet](https://cdn.sparkfun.com/datasheets/Sensors/Proximity/apds9960.pdf), [SparkFun](https://www.sparkfun.com/products/12787)) with ESPHome. The [I²C](https://esphome.io/components/i2c) is required to be set up in your configuration for this sensor to work.

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: The I²C address of the sensor. Defaults to `0x39`.

config_entries.label: Update Interval
config_entries.description: The interval to check the sensor. Defaults to `60s`.

config_entries.label: Ambient Light Gain
config_entries.description: The ambient light gain level. One of 1x, 4x, 16x, 64x. Defaults to `4x`.

config_entries.label: Gesture Gain
config_entries.description: The proximity gain level. One of 1x, 2x, 4x, 8x. Defaults to `4x`.

config_entries.label: Gesture LED Drive
config_entries.description: The gesture LED drive level in mA. One of 100mA, 50mA, 25mA, 12.5mA. Defaults to `100mA`.

config_entries.label: Gesture Wait Time
config_entries.description: The gesture wait time in ms. One of 0ms, 2.8ms, 5.6ms, 8.4ms, 14ms, 22.4ms, 30.8ms, 39.2ms. Defaults to `2.8ms`.

config_entries.label: LED Drive
config_entries.description: The LED drive level in mA. One of 100mA, 50mA, 25mA, 12.5mA. Defaults to `100mA`.

config_entries.label: Proximity Gain
config_entries.description: The proximity gain level. One of 1x, 2x, 4x, 8x. Defaults to `4x`.
